ast.name: error
ast.source: forceFrameRate takes a positive int between 0 and 125, forcing frame rates higher than 125 fps is not supported
ast.target: forceFrameRate 需要一个介于 0 到 125 之间的正整数，不支持强制设置高于 125 fps 的帧率

ast.name: title
ast.source: Ctrl + Click to search. Click to list files.
ast.target: Ctrl + 单击进行搜索。单击列出文件。
